episodes.title: 17-Year-Old Farmer Speaks Out, MLM Cults & Media Censorship
episodes.description:
Karl Stefanovic’s departure, MLM pyramid schemes exposed, and a 17-year-old farmer fighting for the future of Aussie agriculture - we're breaking it all down.

👉Media Shakeups & Free Speech: The team discusses Karl Stefanovic's departure from Channel 9, the censorship of controversial interviews, and the shrinking objectivity of mainstream media.

👉Global Politics Update: Sky News Washington Bureau Chief Jonathan Kearsley joins live from the US to break down the volatile situation between the US, Israel, Iran, and Hezbollah, as well as the UK's leadership transition to Andy Burnham.

👉The Future of Aussie Farming: Meet Jacob Wright, an articulate 17-year-old, fourth-generation farmer from Wodonga who is standing up to major political parties to fight for the agricultural industry.

👉MLMs vs. Pyramid Schemes: Financial expert Scotty Phillips (The Motley Fool) and legal eagle @JamesGlissanOfficial join the show for a fascinating, psychology-driven deep dive into multi-level marketing, Ponzi schemes, and how desperation preys on hope.

👉 The Man Cave Big News: Bill Edgar (The Coffin Confessor) steps into the man cave to break an exclusive, Bonafide first!

01:32:15 – The Man Cave: Bill Edgar (The Coffin Confessor) Exclusive Announcement
